description: Trash-talk with game lingo. Plays well with the Gamer personality.

roasts.template: Your K/D ratio is so low it's basically a suicide prevention hotline number. Please call it.
You're the reason the enemy team has more fun than yours. They're sending thank-you cards.
Your rank isn't a rank, it's a cry for help. The system keeps you around for diversity.
You play support like a hostage — present, but not helping. We tried to negotiate, but you just sat there.
Your aim is so bad, the game has you flagged as a lag switch. Or maybe just lag.
You don't lose. You just redistribute victories to better players. Out of the goodness of your heart.
Your team would carry you, but they already used up their carry slots. Try again next season.
Your strategy is the gaming equivalent of bringing a {item} to a gunfight.
You don't rage quit. You rage continue. Which is honestly a worse reflection on everyone involved.
You're the loading screen of the team — everyone waits for you to be useful, and they never find out.
Your gameplay is so bad the tutorial came back to check on you. It brought snacks. Sympathy snacks.
You grind like you're paying rent on the game. Everyone else is just visiting.
Your inventory management is a war crime. The Geneva Convention has a clause about it. We need to talk. Preferably with lawyers.
You die so much the respawn point sends you Christmas cards. They have your name on the list. The list is long. The list is worried.
Your sensitivity is so high, the cursor is in a different timezone. And it's losing. The cursor has filed a transfer request.
You're the boss check before the actual boss. Easy to beat. Annoying to deal with. Mandatory. Just like therapy. And taxes.
Your inventory is full of items you don't need and a shortage of the ones you do. That's also your love life. Coincidence? I think not.
You main support but you don't support. You just spectate from the back. The back doesn't even know you're there. The back is confused.
Your K/D in life is 0.0/1.0. You have been permanently muted. By the universe. The universe also added you to the do-not-respawn list.
Your FPS is dropping faster than your rank. Both are reaching bedrock. Bedrock is also a ranking tier in some games. You're heading there.
You spend more time in the lobby than in the actual game. The lobby is starting to charge rent. It's sending invoices. The invoices have interest.
You have the reaction time of a Windows XP shutdown. The progress bar is fake. We all know. The bar is also a lie.
Your strategy is 'run in and pray.' Prayer isn't an ability in this game. Or any game. Or real life. The strategy needs work. The work is overdue.
You main {character} just because they're 'cool.' Their pick rate is down. So is your win rate. So is morale. So is the rest of the team.
